entries.errorMessage: {'@list': [{'@type': 'schema:Organization', 'schema:name': 'USGS Geochemistry Lab'}]} is not of type 'array'
entries.message:
ValidationError: {'@list': [{'@type': 'schema:Organization', 'schema:name': 'USGS Geochemistry Lab'}]} is not of type 'array'

Failed validating 'type' in schema['allOf'][1]['properties']['schema:creator']:
    {'description': 'Authors or originators of the resource content. Array '
                    'of Person or Organization objects. Use @list wrapper '
                    'to preserve author order in JSON-LD.',
     'items': {'anyOf': [{'properties': {'@id': {'description': 'reference '
                                                                'to an '
                                                                'agent '
                                                                'defined '
                                                                'elsewhere',
                                                 'type': 'string'}},
                          'type': 'object'},
                         {'$ref': '#/$defs/Person'},
                         {'$ref': '#/$defs/Organization'}]},
     'type': 'array'}

On instance['schema:creator']:
    {'@list': [{'@type': 'schema:Organization',
                'schema:name': 'USGS Geochemistry Lab'}]}
